title: Apply: Cassidy Technical AI Solutions Consultant
description: First action: open the Cassidy resume Drive doc, skim for any final preference edits, then apply only if the application is quick or compensation can be confirmed early. Why it matters: this role maps strongly to JT's AI implementation, workflow troubleshooting, technical discovery, customer enablement, and product-feedback lane, but salary is undisclosed and the role is in-person NYC. Done: application submitted or compensation verified as below target, status/date logged, and any recruiter/application confirmation captured.
